Description: Created to identify and track individual samples during extraction, assay, and analysis at Tufts
ID given by the institution from which the sample came
Island from which the sample came

Specific details related to where the specimen was found; written as provided by the source institution. Provided as geographic coordinates or names of sites around the islands.  EIMA = Eastern Island Management Area. SIMA = Sand Island Management Area. NR = Not Recorded
Is the sample from a museum specimen? Y = Yes. N = No.
Sex of the specimen, if known. M = Male. F = Female. U = Unknown.
Age of the specimen if known. HY = Hatch year. AHY = After hatch year.
Is the feather sample a flight or body feather?
Length of the feather sample analyzed
Mass of the feather sample analyzed
Concentration of corticosterone in the sample in pg/mg
Concentration of corticosterone in the sample in pg/mm
